name: EthSetTokenData
title: EthSetTokenData
syntax: long EthSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long length, char data[] );
description: The function sets the data or a part of data of a token.
It does not resize the token. Use EthResizeToken to change the length.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of a packet that has been created with EthInitPacket
